prose.title: 17c mos
prose.body: The 17C military occupational specialty (MOS) is known as a Cyber Operations Specialist. This is a specialized role in the United States Army that focuses on conducting offensive and defensive operations in cyberspace to protect military and government networks. Some of the responsibilities of a 17C include analyzing network vulnerabilities, conducting network defense and exploitation, identifying cyber threats, and providing assistance in incident response. This MOS plays a critical role in supporting military operations in the cyber domain.
